name: Collect the Cupcake
short_description: A simple clicker game where you strive to get as many cupcakes as you can to win! Unlock epic upgrades that boost your game to the next level. It doesn't matter who you are or where you came from--your brain will get its fair share of dopamine from every. Single. Click.
detailed_description: Eating cupcakes. Addicting clikcker-esque gameplay. No microtransactions. What else is there to like? With this all-new, addicting cupcake-clicking game you'll be having fun in no time! Collect a variety of six different cupcake skins, with innocent gameplay for people of all ages, young and old! Available on windows only.
